subject: A small group of three figures — including a robed woman with a headband, an orc-like mechanic, and a fox-like person — working around a large vehicle or artillery piece in a desert
description: Three figures work in close proximity around a massive metal vehicle or artillery piece in a sunny desert environment. On the left, an orc or green-skinned figure in worn work clothes leans against the machine with a wrench or tool. At center, a taller humanoid woman in a flowing teal-and-gold robe with a red headband stands with calm authority, hands slightly raised. At right, a smaller fox-eared or cat-eared person in light armor sits on a rock reviewing something. In the background, sand dunes stretch to distant desert spires and a blue sky with palm trees visible. The flavor text names Daretti and Pia — both recognizable MTG planeswalkers — but IP-flagging both from visual alone without certainty.
foreground: three figures around a large metal vehicle — mechanic, robed leader, small fox-person — in desert setting
background: desert with sand dunes, palm trees, distant spires, blue sky
